description: Lumax creativity model registry (metadata pattern inspired by InvokeAI BaseModelType + ModelType). Add rows that point at local Diffusers folders or HF repo ids.
sd15_note: You do not need to edit this file for basic Dream/turbo: if stable-diffusion-v1-5 is missing under LUMAX_CREATIVITY_IMAGEN_ROOT, the service can pull runwayml/stable-diffusion-v1-5 from Hugging Face automatically (unless LUMAX_CREATIVITY_DISABLE_SD15_HUB_FALLBACK=1). ControlNet/upscaler ids are matched case-insensitively.
local_scan_note: Optional auto-discovery (unless LUMAX_CREATIVITY_DISABLE_LOCAL_SCAN=1): Diffusers ControlNet folders as direct children of IMAGEN_ROOT or under Mind/Creativity/controlnets/; Spandrel weights as Mind/Creativity/Imagen/upscalers/*.safetensors|.pth|.ckpt. The service does not crawl all of D:\Lumax\models (Ollama/GGUF/etc.) to avoid slow scans and false positives.
notes_invokeai: Model files: mount InvokeAI models (docker-compose) or set LUMAX_INVOKEAI_MODELS_ROOT. Prefer pip-installed diffusers/transformers/xformers inside the Lumax container; mounting Invoke's Python site-packages needs LUMAX_INVOKEAI_PYTHONPATH plus matching Python/torch versions. Optional LUMAX_INVOKEAI_MODELS_CSV; Spandrel rows merge into GET /api/dream/catalog.

controlnets.name: SD1.5 ControlNet Canny
controlnets.description: Same as legacy CONTROLNET_CANNY_PATH under LUMAX_CREATIVITY_IMAGEN_ROOT.

upscalers.name: Lanczos x4 (built-in)
upscalers.description: Fast PIL upscale; no extra weights.
